SEARCH
Package com.example.CampusEventDiscovery.model

Class EventProposal

java.lang.Object
com.example.CampusEventDiscovery.model.EventProposal
public class EventProposal extends Object
EventProposal.java Model class representing a proposal document from the event_proposals collection in Firestore.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    EventProposal()
    Required empty constructor for Firestore deserialization.
    EventProposal(String proposalId, String title, String description, String category, List<String> tags, Timestamp date, String location, long capacity, List<String> sponsors, List<String> foodStalls, String trailerUrl, String organizerId, String organizerName, String status, String adminNote, Timestamp submittedAt, Timestamp reviewedAt, double ticketPrice)
    Full constructor for creating EventProposal objects in code.
